response.overview: A documentary film about K. Venu, who was a pioneer of the Indian radical revolutionary movement but later became a democracy activist. Written and directed by state, national and international award winner M.G. Sasi and produced by Ullattil Achu under the banner of Achu Talkies.
response.tagline: A documentary film about K. Venu, a pioneer of the Indian radical revolutionary movement but later became a democracy activist.
response.title: For Whom The Thunder Roared?
